context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

exporters:
  coralogix:
    domain: "$CORALOGIX_DOMAIN"
    private_key: "$PRIVATE_KEY"

This was working on otel-contrib v0.70 but since upgrading to v0.95 nothing exports. What changed?

checklist.name: explains-that-recent-collector-coralogix-expo
checklist.description: Explains that recent collector / coralogix-exporter versions (≥ v0.76) stopped expanding the unbracketed `$VAR` form silently — the bracketed `${env:VAR}` form is now required. Points at both `domain:` and `private_key:` needing the fix.
